attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Bruno Guimarães (Brazil).

events.description: 卡伦斯·阿库斯 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Douglas Santos (Brazil) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Offside, Brazil. Matheus Cunha is caught offside.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Johny Placide.
Foul by Lucas Paquetá (Brazil).
Gabriel Magalhães (Brazil) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Offside, Brazil. Raphinha is caught offside.
Offside, Brazil. Danilo is caught offside.
Foul by Danilo (Brazil).
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Ricardo Adé.
Attempt blocked. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Josué Casimir.
Offside, Haiti. Carlens Arcus is caught offside.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Carlens Arcus.
Offside, Brazil. Raphinha is caught offside.

events.description: 马特乌斯·库尼亚 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Johny Placide (Haiti). Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.

events.description: 维尼修斯射正。 吉马良斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Raphinha (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Johny Placide (Haiti). Assisted by Lucas Paquetá with a through ball.

events.description: 拉菲尼亚射正。 卢卡斯·帕奎塔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Brazil. Vinícius Júnior is caught offside.
Foul by Raphinha (Brazil).
Corner, Haiti. Conceded by Bruno Guimarães.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 马特乌斯·库尼亚 进球，维尼修斯 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Haiti. Carlens Arcus is caught offside.
Matheus Cunha (Brazil) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Delay in match because of an injury Raphinha (Brazil).

events.description: 拉延 登场，拉菲尼亚 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Casemiro (Brazil).
Delay in match because of an injury Josué Casimir (Haiti).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Casemiro (Brazil).

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 维尼修斯 进球，卢卡斯·帕奎塔 助攻
弗兰茨迪·皮埃罗 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Gabriel Magalhães (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Brazil 3, Haiti 0.

events.description: 多米尼克·西蒙 登场，卡伦斯·阿库斯 离场
威尔逊·伊西多尔 登场，弗兰茨迪·皮埃罗 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Brazil 3, Haiti 0.
Attempt blocked. Wilson Isidor (Haiti) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 威尔逊·伊西多尔射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Dominique Simon (Haiti).
Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Douglas Santos (Brazil).
Offside, Brazil. Douglas Santos is caught offside.
Foul by Danilo (Brazil).

events.description: 路易斯·迪德森 登场，若苏埃·卡西米尔 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Haiti. Conceded by Danilo.
Attempt saved. Ricardo Adé (Haiti) header from the left side of the six yard box is saved in the top left corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil). Assisted by Jean-Ricner Bellegarde with a cross.

events.description: 里卡多·阿德射正。 让-里克纳·贝勒加德参与进攻。
恩德里克 登场，马特乌斯·库尼亚 离场
加布里埃尔·马丁内利 登场，卢卡斯·帕奎塔 离场
道格拉斯·桑托斯 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Douglas Santos (Brazil).
Attempt missed. Ruben Providence (Haiti) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the left following a set piece situation.

events.description: 鲁本·普罗维登斯射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Jean-Kévin Duverne (Haiti) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Ruben Providence following a set piece situation.

events.description: 吉恩·凯文·杜韦纳射门偏出。 鲁本·普罗维登斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Ricardo Adé (Haiti).
Offside, Brazil. Vinícius Júnior is caught offside.
Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 莱尼·约瑟夫 登场，鲁本·普罗维登斯 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Endrick (Brazil).
Foul by Rayan (Brazil).
Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Douglas Santos (Brazil) left footed shot from the left side of the box is too high. Assisted by Rayan.

events.description: 道格拉斯·桑托斯射门偏出。 拉延参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Casemiro (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Brazil. Endrick is caught offside.
Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 达尼洛桑托斯 登场，维尼修斯 离场
埃德森·席尔瓦 登场，吉马良斯 离场
德里克·艾蒂安 登场，让-里克纳·贝勒加德 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Éderson Silva (Brazil).
Casemiro (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Rayan (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Wilson Isidor (Haiti) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is saved in the bottom left corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil). Assisted by Louicius Deedson.

events.description: 威尔逊·伊西多尔射正。 路易斯·迪德森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Haiti. Conceded by Alisson Becker.
Attempt missed. Ricardo Adé (Haiti) right footed shot from more than 35 yards misses to the left. Assisted by Wilson Isidor.

events.description: 里卡多·阿德射门偏出。 威尔逊·伊西多尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Haiti. Louicius Deedson is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Éderson Silva (Brazil) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box misses to the left. Assisted by Gabriel Martinelli.

events.description: 埃德森·席尔瓦射门偏出。 加布里埃尔·马丁内利参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Rayan (Brazil) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Dominique Simon (Haiti) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil). Assisted by Derrick Etienne.

events.description: 多米尼克·西蒙射正。 德里克·艾蒂安参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Haiti. Conceded by Alisson Becker.
Offside, Haiti. Jean-Kévin Duverne is caught offside.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Rayan (Brazil).
Endrick's finish was disallowed for offside in the 78th minute.
qualifiers.source: FIFA Official Match Report + FIFA Official Timeline + ESPN Public Summary

events.description: 恩德里克破门，但因越位进球被取消。比分仍为 3-0。
